zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh於1124年出生在英國越可爾希阿勞時，他的父親Bertram Haget19歲，母親Agnes25歲。他和Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.至少有3個女兒。他去世於1180年在英國越可爾懷吉爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國越可爾懷吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh于1124年出生在英国越可爾希阿勞时，他的父亲Bertram Haget19岁，母亲Agnes25岁。他和Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.至少有3个女儿。他去世于1180年在英国越可爾懷吉爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国越可爾懷吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Haget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: diminutive of   Page  .
English: variant of   Padgett  .

variants.name: Paggett
meanings: English: variant of   Paget  .

variants.name: Pagett
meanings: English: variant of   Paget   or   Padgett  .

variants.name: Page
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Wighill,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  see  Weighell  .

variants.name: Weighell
meanings: English: locative name probably from Wighill (WR Yorks), recorded as Wighale in the 14th century, Wighell in 1490, and Wighill in 1538.

nameMeanings.name: Bainton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Bainton (in East Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, and Oxfordshire), or from Baynton in Wiltshire. In most cases, the placename is from the genitive case of an Old English personal name (Bǣga or Bada) + tūn ‘farm, village’.

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Canadian Hénault or directly of French Hunault (see Henault 2).
Catalan (Añó): Castilianized form of Anyó, probably from the old personal name Annone.
Japanese: variant of   Anno  .

variants.name: Anno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Masayuki, Tadashi, Yoshito.
Japanese: written 安野 ‘peaceful plain’. This surname is rare in Japan proper, and may have originated in the Ryūkyū Islands, where it is pronounced   Ano  .

variants.name: Henault
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Lucien, Martial, Pierre, Camille, Fernand, Laurier, Monique, Normand, Philippe.
French (Hénault): from the ancient Germanic personal name Haginwald, composed of the elements hagin ‘enclosure, protected place’ and wald ‘power, authority’.
Altered form (Hénault) of French Hunault: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hunwald, composed of the elements hun ‘bear cub’ and wald ‘power, authority’. Compare Ano and Eno .

nameMeanings.name: Bertrand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French variant of   Bertram  , imported to Britain by the Normans. In modern times it has been made famous by the English philosopher  Bertrand Russell  (  1872–1970 ), but is only in occasional use.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh was born in 1124, in Healaugh, Yorkshire, England, his father, Bertram Haget, was 19 and his mother, Agnes, was 25. He had at least 3 daughters with Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.. He died in 1180, in Wighill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Wighill, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh est né en 1124, à Healaugh, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Bertram Haget, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.. Il est décédé en 1180, à Wighill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Wighill, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh 1124 in Healaugh, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertram Haget 19 und seine Mutter Agnes 25. Er hatte mit Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1180 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Wighill, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Wighill, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh è nato il nel 1124 nel Healaugh, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Bertram Haget, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.. Morì nel 1180, nel Wighill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Wighill, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Beverley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリー
ja.Healaugh, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアヒーラウ
ja.Wighill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウィギル
ja.lifeSummary: Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaughが1124年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒーラウで生まれた時，父Bertram Hagetは19歳，母Agnesは25歳であった。彼はGundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.との間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1180年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィギルで56歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウィギルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh(이)가 1124년 영국 요르크실르 히로그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertram Haget(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 영국 요르크실르 와이이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 와이이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh nasceu em 1124, em Healaugh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bertram Haget, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.. Ele faleceu em 1180, em Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh родился в 1124 г. в местности хило, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Bertram Haget было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. Он умер в 1180 г. в местности ваиилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ваиилл, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh nació en 1124, en Healaugh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bertram Haget, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.. Murió en 1180, en Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
